description_long: This object is a stylized human figure, likely representing a young boy, with arms extended horizontally. The figure wears a green sleeveless shirt over a brown long-sleeve top, dark blue shorts, and black shoes with white soles. On its head, it has a brown cap with a small tuft of hair sticking out and a pair of large, round goggles resting on the forehead. The facial features are simple, with a neutral expression and minimal detail. The overall design is cartoonish and smooth, with no visible textures or fine surface details. The figure appears solid and is not hollow or open.
description: A cartoonish human figure with a green shirt, brown sleeves, shorts, goggles, and a cap, arms outstretched in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, goggles, green shirt, brown sleeves, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, goggles, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the cap, shirt, shorts, and the figure's outstretched arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible ear and shoe details.
